## Description

Briefly describe the purpose of this PR and the track/phase it belongs to.

## TDD Checklist (Mandatory)

This repository enforces the Master Plan's strict Red/Green/Refactor/Adversarial workflow. Please confirm you have completed the following for your changes:

- [ ] **Red:** I wrote a failing test first that describes the desired behavior.
- [ ] **Green:** I wrote the minimal code to make the test pass.
- [ ] **Refactor:** I cleaned up the code while keeping the tests green.
- [ ] **Adversarial:** I added at least one test designed to break the logic (e.g., malformed inputs, race conditions, limits).

## Additional Notes

Any other information the reviewers should know?
